description_long: This is a rectangular, elongated pillow with a vibrant, multicolored wavy stripe pattern running horizontally across its surface. The stripes feature a repeating sequence of green, orange, red, blue, and cream, interspersed with white ovals and undulating lines, giving the pillow a playful and dynamic appearance. The pillow's fabric appears to be soft and slightly matte, with a gentle puffiness suggesting a plush, comfortable filling. Both the front and back display the same colorful pattern, while the narrow sides show a compressed view of the design. There are no visible tags, labels, or brand logos on any side. The pillow is clean and appears to be in pristine condition, with no visible stains or marks.
description: A rectangular, multicolored pillow with wavy horizontal stripes and a soft, plush appearance. The surface features vibrant green, orange, red, blue, and cream tones in a playful, undulating pattern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, colorful wavy stripe pattern across the entire surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge with a compressed, pointed appearance and the pattern converging at the seam.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the same vibrant wavy stripe pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow, pointed edge and converging pattern.
